main_section_html:
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap');
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body, html { 
  width: 100%; 
  height: 100%; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  background: #f8f9fa; 
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; 
}
#resources-graph-canvas { 
  display: block; 
  width: 100vw; 
  height: 100vh; 
  background-color: #fcfdff;
  background-image: 
    linear-gradient(rgba(100, 149, 237, 0.15) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(100, 149, 237, 0.15) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(rgba(100, 149, 237, 0.4) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(100, 149, 237, 0.4) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: 
    10px 10px,
    10px 10px,
    50px 50px,
    50px 50px;
  background-position: 
    -1px -1px,
    -1px -1px,
    -1px -1px,
    -1px -1px;
}
</style>
<canvas id="resources-graph-canvas"></canvas>
<script src="/assets/helpers_website/js/resources-graph.js"></script>
name: helpers-home
title: Helpers Home

main_section_html: helpers.ie
name: white-paper
title: White Paper
